The health benefits of Zygophyllum sclerophyllum include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health due to its antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, alkaloids, and triterpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Zygophyllum sclerophyllum include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions.
